title: CivBox
body:
# 🌍 **CivBox Modpack** – Enhance Your Civilization Experience!  

**IP:** `civbox.net` *(1.21.2+)*  

⚔️ **CivBox** is a **replayable civilization game** where players gather resources, build societies, and wage war against rival civilizations! You and your fellow citizens will spawn in a unique biome and **forge your own destiny**:  

🏡 **Build a thriving civilization**  
👷 **Choose your role** (Farmer, Miner, Builder)  
🗳️ **Elect a leader & enact policies**  
🤝 **Form alliances or dominate your rivals**  
⚔️ **Test your economic & military strength**  

---  

## 🛠️ What’s in the Modpack?  

🔹 **🎙️ Proximity Voice Chat** – Communicate instantly with nearby players using **Simple Voice Chat**! Plan strategies, coordinate attacks, and build friendships in real time!  
🔹 **🚀 Performance Optimizations** – Better FPS, smoother gameplay!  
🔹 **✨ Quality of Life Improvements** – Small tweaks for a better experience!  
🔹 **✅ 100% Optional** – All custom features are on the server, no mods required!  

📥 **Download now to enhance your CivBox adventure!**
